parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Temu router request body. The `type` field must be `bg.glo.goods.list.get`.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: app_key
x-temu-common-parameters.description: 已创建成功的应用标志

x-temu-common-parameters.name: timestamp
x-temu-common-parameters.description: 时间戳，格式为UNIX时间（秒） ，长度10位，当前时间-300秒<=入参时间<=当前时间+300秒

x-temu-common-parameters.name: sign
x-temu-common-parameters.description: API入参参数签名，签名值根据如下算法给出计算过程

x-temu-common-parameters.name: data_type
x-temu-common-parameters.description: 请求返回的数据格式，可选参数固定为JSON

x-temu-common-parameters.name: access_token
x-temu-common-parameters.description: 用户授权令牌access_token，卖家中心—授权管理，申请授权生成

x-temu-common-parameters.name: version
x-temu-common-parameters.description: API版本，默认为V1，无要求不传此参数

x-temu-request-parameters.name: productName
x-temu-request-parameters.offlineReferenceReason: product name length limits by category

x-temu-response-parameters.name: signLatestJitVersion
x-temu-response-parameters.description: Whether to sign the latest version of JIT pre-sale agreement

x-temu-response-parameters.name: wmsCollectionSourceType
x-temu-response-parameters.description: WMS Collection Source (inconsistent with WMS enum, only record sources of interest)

x-temu-response-parameters.name: sensitiveTypes
x-temu-response-parameters.description: Sensitive Type PURE_ELECTRIC(1, "Pure Electric"), INTERNAL_ELECTRIC(2, "Internal Electric"), MAGNETISM(3, "Magnetism"), LIQUID(4, "Liquid"), POWDER(5, "Powder"), PASTE(6, "Paste"), CUTTER(7, "Tool")

x-temu-response-parameters.name: isForce2Normal
x-temu-response-parameters.description: Whether to Forcefully Convert to General Goods

x-temu-response-parameters.name: wmsCollectionSourceType
x-temu-response-parameters.description: WMS Collection Source (inconsistent with WMS enum, only record sources of interest)

x-temu-response-parameters.name: productSkuSaleExtAttr
x-temu-response-parameters.description: Product SKU Sales Domain Extension Attributes

x-temu-response-parameters.name: productSkuIndividuallyPacked
x-temu-response-parameters.description: Whether the Product SKU is Independently Packaged

x-temu-response-parameters.name: warehouseRegionId1List
x-temu-response-parameters.description: First-level Regional ID List for Shipping Warehouses

x-temu-response-parameters.name: longTransport
x-temu-response-parameters.description: Long-term transportation template, null represent false

x-temu-response-parameters.name: matchSkcJitMode
x-temu-response-parameters.description: Whether to hit SKC layer JIT mode

rows.解决办法: 一般是系统抖动，可参考具体报错文案尝试解决或重试，如果还不行请联系管理员
结合参数错误的具体原因排查，比如页面大小不能大于100等
尝试重试，如果还不行请联系管理员

type.description: API接口名, 形如:bg.* Must be `bg.glo.goods.list.get` for this operation.

app_key.description: 已创建成功的应用标志

timestamp.description: 时间戳，格式为UNIX时间（秒） ，长度10位，当前时间-300秒<=入参时间<=当前时间+300秒

sign.description: API入参参数签名，签名值根据如下算法给出计算过程

data_type.description: 请求返回的数据格式，可选参数固定为JSON

access_token.description: 用户授权令牌access_token，卖家中心—授权管理，申请授权生成

version.description: API版本，默认为V1，无要求不传此参数

productName.x-temu-offline-reference-reason: product name length limits by category

signLatestJitVersion.description: Whether to sign the latest version of JIT pre-sale agreement

wmsCollectionSourceType.description: WMS Collection Source (inconsistent with WMS enum, only record sources of interest)

sensitiveTypes.description: Sensitive Type PURE_ELECTRIC(1, "Pure Electric"), INTERNAL_ELECTRIC(2, "Internal Electric"), MAGNETISM(3, "Magnetism"), LIQUID(4, "Liquid"), POWDER(5, "Powder"), PASTE(6, "Paste"), CUTTER(7, "Tool")

isForce2Normal.description: Whether to Forcefully Convert to General Goods

productSkuSaleExtAttr.description: Product SKU Sales Domain Extension Attributes

productSkuIndividuallyPacked.description: Whether the Product SKU is Independently Packaged

warehouseRegionId1List.description: First-level Regional ID List for Shipping Warehouses

longTransport.description: Long-term transportation template, null represent false

matchSkcJitMode.description: Whether to hit SKC layer JIT mode
